title: Mass Shooting at Winston-Salem Park Leaves Two Dead
summary: A mass shooting at Leinbach Park in Winston-Salem resulted in two fatalities and several injuries.
charlotte_impact: Highlights rising gun violence, impacting community safety and requiring immediate law enforcement and community response.

title: Leistritz Extrusion to Host Reactive Extrusion Workshop
summary: Leistritz Extrusion will host a Reactive Extrusion (REX) Workshop May 13-14 at the Polymers Center of Excellence in Charlotte.
charlotte_impact: Promotes innovation in polymer technology, fostering economic growth and industry collaboration in Charlotte.

title: Suspect Arrested in Pregnant Woman Stabbing Case
summary: A woman with an extensive criminal background has been arrested for stabbing a pregnant woman in a Charlotte grocery store parking lot.

title: Repeat Offender Accused of Stabbing Pregnant Woman

title: Rain Expected This Week

title: Charlotte Falls Short on Equity Training
summary: Charlotte has trained fewer than 25% of its managers after pledging inclusive contracting reforms.

title: Matthews Teen Found Safe

title: Statesville Enacts Water Restrictions Amid Drought
